Question:
Perform a deep dive into academic literature (arXiv, INSPIRE-HEP, Physical Review journals) to identify the 'three universal dimensionless constants' governing the classicality of single-photon Hawking radiation. Specifically, look for: 1. The existence of exactly three such constants. 2. Their exact numerical values. 3. Their theoretical context (e.g., relationship to Hawking temperature, surface gravity, squeezing parameters, or photon occupation numbers). Provide a detailed report with citations if possible.
